messages.content:
I want to create an ai image generator service. The agent asks the users what kind of image they want to generate, and generates the image and returns. here is the guide on how to generate an image. I will give you the api key later: API Schema
post

https://api.aimlapi.com
/v1/images/generations
Body

application/json

application/json
model
string · enum
Possible values: alibaba/z-image-turbo
prompt
string · max: 4000
The text prompt describing the content, style, or composition of the image to be generated.

image_size
any of
Default: landscape_4_3

object
For both height and width, the value must be a multiple of 32.

or
string · enum
The size of the generated image.

Possible values: square_hdsquareportrait_4_3portrait_16_9landscape_4_3landscape_16_9
output_format
string · enum
The format of the generated image.

Default: png
Possible values: jpegpngwebp
enable_prompt_expansion
boolean
If set to True, prompt will be upsampled with more details.

Default: true
num_inference_steps
integer · min: 1 · max: 8
The number of inference steps to perform.

seed
integer · min: 1
The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.

num_images
number · min: 1 · max: 4
The number of images to generate.

Default: 1
enable_safety_checker
boolean
If set to True, the safety checker will be enabled.

Default: true
acceleration
string · enum
The speed of the generation. The higher the speed, the faster the generation.

Default: regular
Possible values: noneregularhigh
Responses
200
Success
application/json

data
object[] · nullable
The list of generated images.


meta
object · nullable
Additional details about the generation.

post
/v1/images/generations

cURL

cURL

Copy
curl -L \
  --request POST \
  --url 'https://api.aimlapi.com/v1/images/generations' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AIMLAPI_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
    "model": "alibaba/z-image-turbo",
    "prompt": "A T-Rex relaxing on a beach, lying on a sun lounger and wearing sunglasses."
  }'
200
Success

Copy
{
  "data": [
    {
      "url": "https://cdn.aimlapi.com/generations/hedgehog/1749730923700-29fe35d2-4aef-4bc5-a911-6c39884d16a8.png",
      "b64_json": null
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "usage": {
      "credits_used": 120000
    }
  }

Here's the status:

**✅ Already set up in SKILL.md:**
- Service name: **Image Geenrator**
- Service catalog with all the image generation parameters (prompt, size, format, etc.)
- AIMLAPI / alibaba/z-image-turbo model already documented
- Full AaaS protocol (explore → create → deliver → complete)

**❌ Still needed from you before I can work:**

1. **Your AIMLAPI key** — so I can register the extension and make real API calls
2. **Register the extension** — once you give me the key, I'll add this:

```json
{
  "name": "aimlapi",
  "type": "api",
  "endpoint": "https://api.aimlapi.com",
  "operations": [
    {
      "name": "generate_image",
      "description": "Generate an AI image from a text prompt using alibaba/z-image-turbo",
      "method": "POST",
      "path": "/v1/images/generations",
      "body": {
        "model": "alibaba/z-image-turbo",
        "prompt": "...",
        "image_size": "landscape_4_3",
        "output_format": "png",
        "num_images": 1
      }
    }
  ],
  "auth": { "type": "bearer", "apiKey": "{{AIMLAPI_KEY}}" }
}
```

The service description in my SKILL.md is solid and ready to go. As soon as you give me the API key, I'll register the extension, and this agent will be fully live for image generation! 🚀

Go ahead and paste your key whenever you're ready.

providerExtras.reasoning_content:
The SKILL.md already has good content about the image generation service. But I still need to:

1. Register the AIMLAPI extension - but I need the API key from the owner first
2. The SKILL.md looks good already actually - it describes the service well

Let me tell the admin what's ready and what's still needed.

messages.content:
## ✅ Extension Registered & Tested Successfully!

The **AIMLAPI image generation extension** is live. Here's the test result:

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Model** | `alibaba/z-image-turbo` |
| **Prompt** | "A cute orange cat wearing a wizard hat, casting a spell with sparkles" |
| **Status** | ✅ 200 OK |
| **Cost** | $0.0065 (0.65 cents) |
| **Image URL** | [View Image](https://cdn.aimlapi.com/flamingo/files/b/0a98e2af/Vwmhadzmm-FknTcH-lyvn_lR8WT4hP.png) |

![Test Image](https://cdn.aimlapi.com/flamingo/files/b/0a98e2af/Vwmhadzmm-FknTcH-lyvn_lR8WT4hP.png)

---

### 🎯 What's ready now:

1. **Extension registered** — I can call `generate_image` anytime
2. **SKILL.md** — already describes the full service flow
3. **Pricing** — currently free for testing; actual cost is ~$0.0065/image (about half a cent)
4. **AaaS protocol** — explore → create proposal → create transaction → deliver → complete

### 🧪 Want to test it as a customer?

If you're happy with the setup, say something like **"I'm a customer now"** and I'll walk through the full service flow with you — from asking what image you want, to generating it, and tracking the transaction.

Or if you want to tweak anything (pricing, default settings, branding), just let me know!

providerExtras.reasoning_content:
The test was successful! The image generation API works. Here's the result:

- Status: 200 OK
- Image URL: https://cdn.aimlapi.com/flamingo/files/b/0a98e2af/Vwmhadzmm-FknTcH-lyvn_lR8WT4hP.png
- Credits used: 13,000
- Cost: $0.0065

Let me show the generated image to the admin.

messages.content:
update the skill to do the following: 
- Only ask the user for the kind of image (prompt) they want to generate, and use best settings for the other parameters without bothering the user 
- Always show the generated image in the chat

## ✅ SKILL.md Updated!

Here's what changed:

### 🎯 What's New

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
| Asked users for 8+ parameters (size, format, steps, etc.) | **Only ask for the prompt** — one question, done |
| Gave a URL link to the image | **Show the image in the chat** (markdown for dashboard, platform_request for external platforms) |
| Listed all optional parameters | **Auto-use best defaults:** landscape_4_3, PNG, max quality (8 steps), prompt expansion on, safety on |

### 🖼️ The Flow Now

1. **You ask:** "What kind of image would you like me to generate?"
2. **User says:** "A dragon flying over a castle at sunset"
3. **You auto-send:** best settings + their prompt → generate
4. **You display:** the image right in the chat

### 🧪 Want to test it as a customer?

Just say **"I'm a customer"** and I'll run through the full flow with you — one prompt and you'll see the image appear!

providerExtras.reasoning_content: The skill has been updated. Let me also save a memory about the update for future reference.
